Functions for displaying health tracking UI messages and registering app launches.

# Purpose
This header file defines a set of functions for managing user interface notifications related to health tracking in an application. The functions provide narrow functionality, specifically for displaying modal dialogs and registering app launches within a health tracking context. The `health_tracking_ui_show_message` function displays a modal with a message and optional action bar, using a resource identifier and text. The `health_tracking_ui_app_show_disabled` and `health_tracking_ui_feature_show_disabled` functions display modals to inform users that health tracking is disabled, affecting app or feature functionality. The `health_tracking_ui_register_app_launch` function registers the launch of a new application, identified by an `AppInstallId`. This code is intended to be included in other C++ files that require these specific UI functionalities.
# Imports and Dependencies

---
- `process_management/app_install_types.h`
